allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: ESRI default layer, zoom 18, hide mic FAB, auto-derive on record

- Default map layer → ESRI World Imagery \(was StadiaSatellite\)
- Zoom level 15 → 18 \(~250m across screen at Medellin latitude\)
- Hide mic FAB when recorder modal is open \(matches play button pattern\)
- Auto-start derive session when recording begins \(if none active\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
